## Type of Change

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change; code cleanup, extraction, renaming)
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Test-only change
- [ ] Build / CI / tooling
- [ ] Breaking change (migration notes required below)

<!-- Bullet list of specific changes. One concern per PR. -->

-

## Testing

- [ ] `swift test` passes locally
- [ ] New tests added (Swift Testing preferred for new suites)
- [ ] Manual smoke test completed on macOS 14+ (describe below)
- [ ] UI changes verified in a release build, not only in debug

### Manual Test Notes

<!-- What did you actually click / type / run? What did you see? -->

## Screenshots / Recordings

<!-- Required for any UI change. Before and after recommended. -->

## Related Issues

<!-- Closes #123, Fixes #456, Related to #789 -->

## Review Checklist

- [ ] No files over 600 LOC added or left behind (extract extensions if needed)
- [ ] No hardcoded paths, credentials, or user-specific configuration
- [ ] No new third-party Swift Package dependencies (see `CONTRIBUTING.md`)
- [ ] Public APIs and complex logic documented inline
- [ ] Commit history is clean (squashed or rebased)
- [ ] Branch name follows `feat/short-description`, `fix/short-description`, etc.

## Breaking Changes

<!-- Leave "None" if no breaking change. Otherwise describe what changed,
     what users need to do, and how to migrate. -->

None.
